content.en:
The first way to upgrade the Treasure of the Other Shore is to find more Purple Ruins Crystals on the other side and integrate them into the Treasure of the Other Shore, so that the Treasure of the Other Shore can be quickly upgraded.

This method is to consume too much purple ruin crystal on the other side, which is not worth it.

For a force, if there are enough Purple Ruins Crystal on the other side, it will definitely cultivate a few more Treasure Treasures on the other side, instead of using them to upgrade the Treasure on the other side.

After all, the purple ruin crystal on the other side is too rare!

The second way to upgrade is to use the Ruin God Gold.

The Ruin God Gold itself can be used to forge the top Origin Rule weapons, and it can also be used for the Arcana upgrade on the other side, but it requires a lot of Ruin God Gold.

If you want to upgrade to a medium Otherside Treasure, you need at least 50,000 pieces of Ruin God Gold.

This method requires too much ruin god gold, who can take it?

There is also a third way to upgrade, that is, when breaking through to the origin of the upper realm, take advantage of this opportunity to absorb the origin of the land on the other side of the eternal shore and integrate it into the treasure of the other side, and use the origin of the land on the other side of the eternal shore to forcibly upgrade the treasure of the other side to the medium treasure of the other side.

At present, there are only three approximate solutions.

It can be said that each method is very difficult, and it seems that the simplest is the third method, but many Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors are simply unable to cultivate the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Treasure, and many of them have successfully cultivated the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor after they have broken through.

In that case, the third option will not work.

"For other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, the three methods are almost impossible. However, I can use the second method of upgrading!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He can now collect the Ruin God Gold in the Shadow River, and if he gathers more than 50,000 pieces of Ruin God Gold, he can naturally do it.

Once he upgrades the Arcana of the Other Side, his strength will skyrocket.

Now, he is already in the Origin Middle Realm, it is even more difficult to improve his cultivation, and it is also difficult to improve the Origin Rules on the other side, this kind of shortcut that can quickly improve his strength, he naturally wants to do it!

......

River of Shadows.

Ye Tian's Innocent Shadow Dragon copied his body to find the ruin god gold one after another, and after finding a certain amount of ruin god gold, he handed it over to Ye Tian's real body to copy the body.

Gradually, the number of his ruin god gold exceeded 10,000.

This time, instead of building these 10,000 pieces of ruin god gold into the Eternal Ruin God Array, he kept it.

And Ye Tian's other replica body checked various inheritance knowledge on Wind Tooth Island, and learned more about the cultivation of the Origin Middle Realm.

According to the inheritance knowledge, the span of the Origin Middle Realm is very large, and if you want to cultivate to the peak realm of the Origin Middle Realm, it is too difficult.

A Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor like the Lord of Qingyun didn't know how many tens of thousands of primeval epochs he had stayed in this realm, and even in units of 100 million, endless years of penance, he still hadn't raised his cultivation to the extreme of the Origin Middle Realm.

If Ye Tian wanted to raise his cultivation to the extreme of the Origin Middle Realm, he had to raise the Origin of the Other Shore to the level of 1 million, and he was only 100,000 now.

"The improvement of the Origin Rules on the other side can improve the Origin of the Other Shore, but in the future, even the Eternal Ruins Divine Array is estimated to be unable to help me break the bottleneck of the rules, and it is definitely not possible to completely count on the Origin Rules of the other side. "

Ye Tian didn't think too much about it.

He didn't want to become the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor yet, he just wanted to improve his strength, how much he could improve.

In addition to improving the Treasure of the Other Shore, he can also create the top of the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore.

The few supreme techniques he knows now belong to the general supreme techniques of the other side, after all, he didn't know much about the origin rules of the other side before, and the realm is low, so it is very good to be able to create the supreme technique of the other side.

But now it's different, his other shore origin rules have been upgraded to seventy percent of the realm, and he has mastered more golden scripts and black scripts on the other side, and it is naturally possible to create top-notch supreme techniques on the other side.

"Then let's prepare for the creation of the top Beyond Supreme Technique and the upgrade of the Beyond Treasure!"

Ye Tian muttered.

As the years passed, the ruin god gold collected by Ye Tian gradually approached fifty thousand.

Finally this day.

The ruin god gold has reached more than 50,000 yuan, which is almost enough to upgrade the treasure on the other side.

However, in order to ensure the success of the upgrade, he is going to collect more Ruin God Gold.

And just like that, another long time passed.

"More than 60,000 pieces of ruin god gold, it's enough!"

Ye Tian took the more than 60,000 pieces of ruin god gold, and according to a secret method in the inheritance of Fengya Island, he refined the ruin god gold and integrated it into the treasure of the other side.

Airplanes!!!!!

In the origin of the other side, one piece after another of the ruin god gold was tempered and integrated into the treasure of the other side under a certain power, and the treasure of the other side was beaten and tempered again and again, so that the treasure of the other side gradually became stronger.

The years passed.

Piece after piece of ruin god gold was consumed.

"50,000 pieces of ruin god gold have been used!"

Ye Tian continued to use the Ruin God Gold, and he knew that this Peer Treasure Spear was about to transform into a medium Peer Treasure Spear.

Finally, when more than 57,000 pieces of ruin god gold were consumed, the Treasure Spear on the other side completely ushered in a transformation.

Rumble!!!!!

The Treasure Spear of the Other Shore began to transform into a medium Treasure of the Other Shore, and it would probably take a while of transformation before it could truly transform successfully.

During this period of time, Ye Tian has been watching the transformation of the treasure on the other side.

It took about dozens of primeval epochs for this Peer Treasure spear to transform successfully.

Ye Tian tested the power of the Medium Peer Shore Treasure Spear, and its attack power was extremely terrifying, far surpassing the inferior Peer Treasure Spear.

With the middle treasure on the other side, Ye Tian's strength has skyrocketed.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian found a lot of ruin god gold again, so he built an eternal ruin god array on Fengya Island again, and he wanted to use this eternal ruin god array to improve the origin rules on the other side again.

For the next hundred or so years, he had been cultivating in the Eternal Ruins Divine Array.

However, this promotion was not satisfactory.

He just raised the Origin Rule of the Other Shore from the Seventy Percent Realm to the Seventy Percent Three Realm.

"Sure enough, the higher the realm of the Origin Rules on the other side, the more difficult it is to improve. If my Origin Rule Realm on the other side is raised to eighty percent in the future, the Eternal Ruins Divine Array is estimated to not be of much help!" Ye Tian said darkly.

However, even so, he still had to collect the ruin god gold, build the eternal ruin god array, and comprehend the origin rules of the other side.

The other side.

He is also trying his best to create the top supreme art of the other side, and he has failed again and again, but each failure will give him some more experience.

Before you know it, tens of thousands of primeval years have passed. ~
